data.title: Dow Jones hits record close, S&P 500 at intraday high post-Christmas holiday. Palantir, Tesla, Google, Nvidia in buy areas.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a record closing high while the S&P 500 reached a new intraday peak approaching the Christmas holiday. Stocks such as Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are experiencing strong buying activity. Following the holiday break, Dow Jones Futures indicate that the stock market continues to rise towards all-time highs.

data.title: Vitalik praises Grok for improving X despite flaws, making it more truth-friendly by challenging assumptions.
data.description: According to Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, Grok is becoming known for its ability to enhance truth-friendliness by X. The platform stands out for its tendency to question users' beliefs rather than simply validating them. This approach encourages critical thinking and open-mindedness, ultimately fostering a more honest and objective discourse.

data.title: TIER IV and JR Central form alliance to promote regional development with rail and autonomous driving integration in Tokyo on Dec. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Tokyo on December 25, 2025, TIER IV, a leading developer of open-source software for autonomous driving, revealed its partnership with Central Japan Railway Company (JR Central), involving a capital and business alliance. The collaboration aims to strengthen their operations and enhance their services in the autonomous driving sector.

data.title: Over 100 Santas participate in Tamarack Resort's "Santa Skis Free" tradition on Christmas Day, joined by elves and a grinch.
data.description: In Tamarack, Idaho on December 25, 2025, the Tamarack Resort marked Christmas Day with its yearly Santa Skis Free event. More than 100 participants, including Santas, elves, and a mischievous grinch, enjoyed a day of skiing and snowboarding on the slopes, spreading holiday joy. Visitors were decked out in complete Santa attire to embrace the festive spirit.

data.title: Dow Jones reaches a record close, S&P 500 at intraday high before Christmas. Stocks like Palantir, Tesla, Google and Nvidia are in buy zones.
data.description: The Dow Jones closed at a new record high, while the S&P 500 reached an intraday peak before Christmas. Stocks like Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are currently in favorable buying zones. Dow Jones futures are up after the market holiday, with the S&P 500 continuing to trend upwards.
